brand.name: Bloom English
brand.tagline: Learn English, bloom at your own pace

dash.subtitleStudent: Keep learning at your own pace.

landing.heroSubtitle: A living campus with 1-on-1 and group classes, interactive material, games and real progress tracking. From A1 to C1, FCE prep and phonetics practice.
landing.trust: Live classes · Tailored material · Track your progress
landing.featuresTitle: Everything to learn, in one place
landing.featuresSubtitle: A campus designed to make every class count and the journey fun.
landing.f1Body: Every 1-hour class, timed and choreographed, ready to share on screen live.
landing.f2Body: Quizzes, videos, song lyrics and interactive games inside every class.
landing.f3Body: Homework, grades and feedback, and when you're ready to level up.
landing.f4Body: From A1 to C1, with neatly organized FCE prep and phonetics tracks.
landing.f5Body: Practice English sounds, record your voice and improve your accent.
landing.f6Body: Your teacher releases content at your pace and adds material just for you.
landing.levelsTitle: A clear path, level by level
landing.levelsSubtitle: Always know where you are and what comes next.
landing.ctaBody: Step into the campus and start your English journey today.
landing.footer: Made with love to make learning English a joy.

curriculum.subtitleStudent: Your learning path, lesson by lesson.

welcome.title: Hi! Welcome aboard 🌱
welcome.body: I'm Ms. Jime and I'm so happy to have you here. This campus is your place to learn English calmly and joyfully: you'll find each class's material, games, videos and your feedback, all in one place. We'll go step by step, at your own pace, and I promise you'll surprise yourself with how much you can achieve. I'm always on your side. Let's bloom! 💛

progress.title: My progress
progress.subtitle: Watch your garden bloom as you move forward.
progress.start: Your garden is ready to grow. Complete your first lesson!
progress.noLevel: You don't have a level yet. Your teacher will set it up soon.
